title: astragalus glaucacanthos
intro: Astragalus glaucacanthos, also known as the Blue Spurred Vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus glaucacanthos include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue and stress, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Astragalus glaucacanthos can be prepared as a decoction, powder, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
